---
name: Question / Discussion
about: Ask a question about the framework
title: "[QUESTION] "
labels: question, discussion
assignees: ''

---

## Your Question

What do you want to know?

## Context

- Which framework/topic?
- Why are you asking?
- What are you trying to do?

## Related Documentation

Have you checked:
- [ ] README.md
- [ ] CONTRIBUTING.md
- [ ] 29_GOVERNANCE/GOVERNANCE.md
- [ ] Specific framework documentation
- [ ] /public_building/ examples

## What Would Help?

- [ ] Clarification on existing documentation
- [ ] Examples of how to use [feature]
- [ ] Explanation of claim [reference]
- [ ] Other:

---

**All frameworks are open to discussion.** No question is too basic or too advanced.

If your question leads to a proposal, you can convert it to a PR to /public_building/ later.
